opinion.h4: McGILL ET AL. v. RYALS, SHERIFF, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE MIDDLE DISTRICT OF ALABAMA. No. 381, Misc. Decided October 17, 1966.
opinion.p: Vernon Z. Crawford, Morton Stavis, William M. Kunstler, Arthur Kinoy and Benjamin E. Smith for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction because the case was not appropriate for a three-judge court.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that a three-judge court was properly convened and would affirm the judgment of the lower court.
